tools.name: acoustic_fembem_capstone_suite_artifact_gate
tools.title: First-Order FEM/BEM Capstone Suite Artifact Gate
tools.description: Validates a shared existing-session MATLAB replay of the native GYP-091..100 suite against one NGSolve capability query, including H1, HCurl, Laplace/Helmholtz BEM, low-frequency, analytic sphere, and P1 trace evidence.

summary_json.description: Compact JSON metadata for an already executed shared-session GYP-091..100 capstone run.
